## Is this a Council issue or a platform issue?
<!-- Council is a Claude Code plugin. Some reported "bugs" are actually
     issues in the underlying platform or model. If you're not sure,
     try reproducing without Council installed.

     If the problem persists without Council, file the issue with your
     platform instead. -->

- [ ] I confirmed this issue does not occur without Council installed
